violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and bar were lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2025
Hand washing signage was observed at the bar 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Technician arrived during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
The water connections to the bar 3-bay sink were not attached. Technician arrived during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
The floor and wall junctures in the bar area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2025
A light was observed non-functional at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2025
